actions.text: Amendment SA 5294 ruled out of order by the chair.

Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5294, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 47 - 51. Record Vote Number: 95.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 305(b)(2) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5294.
Amendment SA 5294 proposed by Senator Alsobrooks.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5294, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 47 - 51. Record Vote Number: 95.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5294 proposed by Senator Alsobrooks.

purpose: To establish a deficit-neutral reserve fund relating to increasing funding for child care for families.
